entity.description: It's time to play pretend bakery with 15 Play-Doh accessories and a 3-tiered toy cupcake display. Just shape a variety of make-believe cupcakes and then decorate with silly sprinkles and imaginary frosting. Make it extra festive with 3 cans of Play-Doh Confetti compound and 5 solid colors. The playmat is a perfect space to play and keep their creations off the table. This Play-Doh kit is a great kids play kitchen toy that makes a fun gift for girls and boys 3 years and up. PLAY-DOH and HASBRO and all related trademarks and logos are trademarks of Hasbro, Inc.

displayMetadata.value: From rainy days to birthdays, sprinkle some imaginative play into the day with the Play-Doh Cupcake Tower Playset.

product.description: Drop by for creative fun with the Play-Doh Donut Drop Shop Playset! Kids can create 3 different kinds of pretend donuts (and more) with this Play-Doh playset. Just set the built-in donut mold to make a fancy, filled, or classic shape, and then add Play-Doh compound. Next, crank the handle until the top pops open and watch the pretend donuts drop onto the base! Decorate the creations with the icing machine, frosting stamper, pretend sprinkles, and molds on the playset. Add crazy croissants or pretend drinks for even more creative ideas. Imagination toys like this Play-Doh set are perfect gift ideas for kids' birthdays, secret Santa, or even rewards for their big achievements.

metaData.Key Information: Classic, filled, or fancy. Kids decide the special of the day with this Play-Doh donut toy for girls and boys 3 years and up.

product.name: Playdoh Donut Drop Shop Playset

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information: With different levels for the balls to travel, this tower is sure to be tons of fun. Each layer of the tower features a vibrant color and drops the ball in a different spot which makes it enticing for children. They're sure to have tons of fun watching the balls travel down the tower. It helps your child learn cause and effect early as they see what happens as they drop the ball into the top level. It also develops fine motor skills, encouraging hands-on activity and sensory stimulation. This isn't your typical ball tower; these balls make sounds that your child will love. Rattling sounds will catch kids' attention as the balls descend the ramps one at a time. Open: 39 x 20 x 20cm
metaData.SAP Product Name: Lucky Baby Montessori Rolling Ball Pile Stacking Tower
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool and dry place

product.name: Lucky Baby Montessori Rolling Ball Pile Stacking Tower

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

product.description: Get ready to Bow-Wow Build with your favorite PAW Patrol pup, Rubble & a toy bulldozer with working construction tools, in the Rubble & Crew, Crane Tower Playset! The Crane Tower looks just like it does in the show and features exciting kids construction toys like a rotatable crane toy, with an additional claw attachment, that kids can use to hoist things up and down! The tower also includes a Kinetic Build-It compound molding system that lets you load two of the double sided molds, with either a red or brown kinetic sand compound, and then pull down on the giant red lever to lower the impactor and form your own building blocks and place them on the base platform! Once your blocks are ready, place Rubble in the elevator and raise him to the top of the tower, and into the crane control pod, then use the crane to lift the blocks and move them where you want them! Then, for one last surprise, push the giant red button at the front of the tower to activate the lights and hear sounds and phrases that you know from the show! For even more exciting ways to play, look for all the Rubble & Crew construction truck toys and toy figures and playsets with Kinetic Build-It sand, along with the Bark Yard Workshop playset and to expand your world of pretend play building toys even more (each sold separately)! Bring the excitement of the Rubble & Crew series to life with the Crane Tower Playset!

metaData.Key Information: Get ready to Bow-Wow Build with your favorite PAW Patrol pup, Rubble & a toy bulldozer with working construction tools, in the Rubble & Crew, Crane Tower Playset!
metaData.SAP Product Name: Paw Patrol Rubble n Crew Barn Yard Crane Tower Playset

metaData.Key Information: The Roly-Poly can swing in different directions which can train the baby's tracking ability and improve hand-eye coordination. Designed with music elements, your little one will love exploring the simple counting 1-3, the vibrant colours of the stacking rings, and delightful nursery rhymes/songs. Rainbow stacking toy can help your baby recognize colours and numbers, as well as develop their hand-eye coordination. Gently press the bear head to trigger music to attract the baby's attention. Interesting pairing of geometric figures: 5 small building blocks with different shapes acan be matched with donuts. It can also be stored in the bottom graphic base. Donuts are hand rattles when taken out alone, the ball rocks to make a pleasant sound. 4 bear expression educate the child. Open: 15 x 15 x 26 cm

product.description: When girls play with Barbie, they imagine everything they can become, and for those that love taking care of their furry friends, they can become Veterinarians! The clinic includes a pink hair Barbie doll, 2 pets, an exam table, and vet accessories! Kids can make casts for their animal patient with a realistic cast making feature to create casts for the patient's legs and create wraps with the bandage maker! Kids will love bringing their animal friends to the clinic and back to good health! Doll cannot stand alone. Colors and decorations may vary. Makes a great gift for ages 4 and up.

metaData.Key Information: Explore a world of animal caretaking fun with the Barbie Fast Cast Veterinarian Clinic playset!

product.name: Barbie Career Pet Vet Playset

offers.description: Buy 1 Barbie Career Pet Vet Playset @ $17.00 Off

product.description: The Polly Pocket Kitty Airways Playset is ready for take-off! With two micro dolls and 19 accessories, imaginations are sure to soar sky high. The adorable kitty plane exterior opens to a multi-level aircraft! Play pilot, passenger, or both! Dolls can stow luggage in one of the overhead bins and take a seat by the window or use the restroom. Buckle up – the fun is about to begin! Serve drinks and treats from the snack cart – just like a real plane! It's a party in the main cabin dolls and pet kitten can perform on the spinning stage before heading to baggage claim. When it's time to run, fold it up for on-the-go fun! Ideal for ages four years old and up. Colors and decorations may vary.

metaData.Key Information: The Polly Pocket Kitty Airways Playset is ready for take-off! With two micro dolls and 19 accessories, imaginations are sure to soar sky high.
